357.issue_title: Fix agent lifecycle: parent detection, submit_pr base, end-issue safety

cycles.title: IBranchParentReader Protocol

deliverables.description: IBranchParentReader(Protocol) with get_parent_branch(branch: str) -> str | None in mcp_server/core/interfaces/__init__.py
mypy passes on mcp_server/core/interfaces/__init__.py with no new errors

cycles.exit_criteria: IBranchParentReader exists with exactly one method signature. mypy clean on interfaces module. No other production files modified.

cycles.title: BranchStateParentReader implementation

deliverables.description: mcp_server/managers/branch_parent_reader.py (new file) containing BranchStateParentReader implementing IBranchParentReader
BranchStateParentReader.__init__(state_reader: IStateReader, git_config: GitConfig)
get_parent_branch() returns parent_branch on issue match, None on mismatch or absent parent
Unit tests: happy path, issue mismatch returns None, parent_branch None returns None, state load edge case

cycles.exit_criteria: All 4 unit tests pass. mypy clean on new module and interfaces. Quality gates pass on changed files.

cycles.title: EnforcementRunner F6: GitConfig injection + bootstrap predicate + blast radius

deliverables.description: EnforcementRunner.__init__ gains required git_config: GitConfig param; default_base_branch param removed
_handle_check_context_loaded: branch resolution moved before predicate; mismatch bypass added after absent check
server.py EnforcementRunner wiring: git_config=git_config added; default_base_branch kwarg removed
All 9 EnforcementRunner test call sites updated: git_config param added, default_base_branch kwarg removed where present
New integration test: gate inactive when state.json present but issue_number mismatches branch
Existing tests test_gate_inactive_on_bootstrap_no_state_json and test_gate_blocks_tool_when_context_not_loaded still pass

cycles.exit_criteria: All EnforcementRunner tests pass. New mismatch test passes. mypy clean. Quality gates pass on all changed files.

cycles.title: SubmitPRTool F4: IBranchParentReader param + base resolution + blast radius

deliverables.description: SubmitPRTool.__init__ gains required branch_parent_reader: IBranchParentReader as 5th param
SubmitPRTool.execute() base resolution chain: params.base or reader.get_parent_branch(branch) or git_config.default_base_branch
server.py SubmitPRTool wiring: branch_parent_reader=BranchStateParentReader(state_reader=self._state_repository, git_config=git_config) added
_make_submit_pr_tool helper in test_submit_pr_atomic_flow.py updated with branch_parent_reader param
_make_tool_for_lod helper in test_submit_pr_tool.py updated with branch_parent_reader param
Unit tests: params.base priority, reader result used, fallback to default
Integration test: PR opened against reader-provided parent branch

cycles.exit_criteria: All SubmitPRTool tests pass including new base resolution tests. mypy clean. Quality gates pass on all changed files.

cycles.title: Prompt and agent doc fixes (F2, F3, F5)

deliverables.description: start-issue.prompt.md non-epic step 6: explicit statement that branch is pre-initialized; @imp starts on already-initialized branch
imp.agent.md: precondition paragraph added before startup step 1: @co must initialize; uninitialized branch reaching @imp is a process violation; do not call initialize_project as recovery
end-issue.prompt.md: git_pull inserted after git_checkout(base_branch); merge_commit_sha reachability verification step added before git_delete_branch

cycles.exit_criteria: All three files updated. Human review confirms each file against research.md Corrected Behavior section. No pytest coverage applicable.
